Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp.McpServerConfig

Packages that use McpServerConfig
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.

  • Uses of McpServerConfig in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.addPrompt(McpPromptHandler... handlers)
    Convenience: append one or more prompt handlers.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.addResource(McpResourceHandler... handlers)
    Convenience: append one or more resource handlers.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.addTool(McpToolHandler... handlers)
    Convenience: append one or more tool handlers.
    protected abstract McpServerConfig
    McpRestServlet.createMcpConfig()
    Factory method for the McpServerConfig backing this servlet.
    McpServerConfig
    McpEndpoint.getMcpConfig()
    Returns the McpServerConfig backing this endpoint.
    McpServerConfig
    McpRestServlet.getMcpConfig()
    Returns the McpServerConfig backing this servlet.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setCapabilities(ServerCapabilities capabilities)
    Sets the explicit capabilities advertisement.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setCursor(McpCursor cursor)
    Sets the pagination strategy.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setInstructions(String instructions)
    Sets initialize instructions.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setPrompts(List<McpPromptHandler> prompts)
    Sets the prompt handler list.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setProtocolVersion(String protocolVersion)
    Sets the protocol revision.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setResources(List<McpResourceHandler> resources)
    Sets the resource handler list.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setServerInfo(Implementation serverInfo)
    Sets the server identity.
    McpServerConfig
    McpServerConfig.setTools(List<McpToolHandler> tools)
    Sets the tool handler list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JsonRpcResponse
    McpDispatcher.dispatch(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx)
    Dispatch the supplied JSON-RPC request against the supplied configuration.
    static JsonRpcResponse
    Mcp.handle(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx)
    Dispatches a JSON-RPC request through the shared McpDispatcher instance.
